description: While not personally wealthy, your control over the Bay Street Financial District gives you access to a vast array of resources.
coterieBackgrounds.name: Resources
rules: You may commit coterie Resources to Projects or other endeavors.

description: You have earned the enmity of a very powerful, very ancient, very mysterious enemy.
coterieFlaws.name: Adversary
rules: Your enemy is a methuselah or a cabal of powerful elders.
The Storyteller should use them at least once per story.

description: You have a fleet of vehicles and the staff to drive them.
domainMerits.name: Transportation

description: Your domain comes with certain responsibilities.
domainFlaws.name: Custodians
rules: You must secure the main entry points of Union Station and the Billy Bishop Ferry (from Billy Bishop Airport, on Centre Island) against unauthorized entry by Kindred of any sect.
Failure to do so will result in loss of reputation, trust in your rule, or worse.
